docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ANGELA COOPER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF - OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $115.00 SERVED JUL-01-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LI, HONGZHOU

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR (ANGELA COOPER)IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HONGZHOU LI IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,855.00 FILED BY CCSF - OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT LI, HONGZHOU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-20-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
